name: MHA- The Accident
description:
Welcome to MHA RP

This you can be a student, teacher, or pro hero.

This rp is about you accidentally killed civilians and villains while on a mission and now you on a run will you surrender peacefully or will you continue to run or join the villains.. your choice..

Class 1-A, Aizawa, LOV, and AFO is all here…

Everyone is 18 years old and older

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:

Discord: here
creator: Papa Ren
